item.title: Forging Ram’s Horn Scroll Hooks
item.description: Watch the process of forging ram’s horn scrolls for decorative hooks. A blend of technique and craftsmanship creates strong, elegant metal designs.

media:content.media:title: Forging Ram’s Horn Scroll Hooks
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of forging ram’s horn scrolls for decorative hooks. A blend of technique and craftsmanship creates strong, elegant metal designs.

item.title: Forged Skillet Holder for Easy Camping
item.description: See how a forged skillet holder makes camping cooking easier. A practical blacksmithing project designed for stability and convenience over an open fire.

media:content.media:title: Forged Skillet Holder for Easy Camping
media:content.media:description: See how a forged skillet holder makes camping cooking easier. A practical blacksmithing project designed for stability and convenience over an open fire.

item.title: Chevron and Wheat Twist Forge Welding
item.description: Learn how to create chevron and wheat twist patterns using forge welding. Detailed techniques for crafting strong, decorative twisted steel designs.

media:content.media:title: Chevron and Wheat Twist Forge Welding
media:content.media:description: Learn how to create chevron and wheat twist patterns using forge welding. Detailed techniques for crafting strong, decorative twisted steel designs.

item.title: Forged Iron Skillet from Scratch
item.description: Watch a forged iron skillet come to life from raw steel. See the shaping, hammering, and finishing steps behind this durable cooking tool.

media:content.media:title: Forged Iron Skillet from Scratch
media:content.media:description: Watch a forged iron skillet come to life from raw steel. See the shaping, hammering, and finishing steps behind this durable cooking tool.

item.title: Best Way to Twist Square Tubing
item.description: Learn the most effective method to twist square tubing evenly. Tips and techniques for clean, consistent results in metalworking and fabrication.

media:content.media:title: Best Way to Twist Square Tubing
media:content.media:description: Learn the most effective method to twist square tubing evenly. Tips and techniques for clean, consistent results in metalworking and fabrication.

item.title: Forging Custom Barbecue Tongs by Hand
item.description: Watch the process of forging durable barbecue tongs from raw steel. A hands-on metalworking project designed for grilling season and built to last.

media:content.media:title: Forging Custom Barbecue Tongs by Hand
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of forging durable barbecue tongs from raw steel. A hands-on metalworking project designed for grilling season and built to last.

item.title: Making a Quilt Square From Start to Finish
item.description: Follow the step-by-step process of creating a quilt square from the first cut to the final stitch, highlighting the precision and craftsmanship behind quilting.

media:content.media:title: Making a Quilt Square From Start to Finish
media:content.media:description: Follow the step-by-step process of creating a quilt square from the first cut to the final stitch, highlighting the precision and craftsmanship behind quilting.

item.title: Forging an Herb Chopper by Hand
item.description: Watch a blacksmith forge an herb chopper from raw steel. This step-by-step demo shows the shaping, hammering, and finishing process behind a handcrafted kitchen tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Herb Chopper by Hand
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmith forge an herb chopper from raw steel. This step-by-step demo shows the shaping, hammering, and finishing process behind a handcrafted kitchen tool.

item.title: Twisting Hot Angle Iron by Hand
item.description: See the process of heating and twisting angle iron in a blacksmithing demonstration. Learn how metal responds to heat and force for custom craftsmanship projects.

media:content.media:title: Twisting Hot Angle Iron by Hand
media:content.media:description: See the process of heating and twisting angle iron in a blacksmithing demonstration. Learn how metal responds to heat and force for custom craftsmanship projects.

item.title: Forging a Quilt Square Back Plate DIY
item.description: Step-by-step guide to forging a quilt square back plate. Learn how to shape and finish steel for a durable and precise metalworking project.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Quilt Square Back Plate DIY
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step guide to forging a quilt square back plate. Learn how to shape and finish steel for a durable and precise metalworking project.
